title: Exceptions cause should be either an exception or None
description: Ensure exception cause is either an exception or None.
message: Exception cause should be either an exception or None.
recommendation: Avoid using a custom exception as a cause, use None instead.

noncompliant.description: Raising an exception with a custom exception as its cause.

compliant.description: Raising an exception with None as its cause.
Raising an exception without a cause.

why_is_this_an_issue: Using a custom exception as a cause can lead to unintended behavior and increased complexity.
how_to_fix: Use None as the exception cause instead, or don't provide a cause at all.

logic.new_check_type_doc: Checks if the exception cause is either an instance of the built-in Exception class or None.

metadata.title: Exceptions cause should be either an exception or None
